title: Owing tax on a TFSA - Canada.ca
content:
## Updated TFSA contribution room available in CRA account starting April 2026
TFSA records from 2025 will be processed by April 2026. This is the best time to check your TFSA contribution room in your CRA account. Always verify your contribution room with your financial institution records to avoid over-contribution. Refer to: Calculate your TFSA contribution room .

## Services and information

### If you have to pay tax on a TFSA
Why you may owe tax, how to pay it, what to do if you disagree

### Tax on excess amounts
How excess amounts are taxed and how to report them to the CRA

### Tax on non-resident contributions
How non-resident contributions are taxed and how to report them to the CRA

### Tax on non-permitted investments
How non-permitted investments are taxed and how to report them to the CRA

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
